description: A color candid photograph shot from a low angle at a Police Week ceremony on the grounds of the U.S. Capitol. A row of uniformed police officers in dark dress uniforms (some with gold braided shoulder cords and Chicago-style checkerboard-band caps) stand at parade rest with white gloves, lined up along a red-carpeted platform. The white dome of the U.S. Capitol rises against a blue, partly cloudy sky in the background. There is no graphic text or design overlay (OCR returned only noise), so this is a documentary event photograph, not a designed meme. It accompanies the White House tweet honoring police and peace officers during Police Week.
